regional_cost_note: Carpet layers in Upper Hutt typically charge $65–$95/hr. Supply-and-lay carpet is usually quoted per m²: expect $38–$65/m² for mid-range carpet installed.

businesses.name: Barry Flooring Ltd
businesses.known_for: Carpet installation, stretches, and repairs with over a decade of experience, serving the Hutt Valley and broader Wellington region.
